sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
The Private Club Trio brings together three premium fragrances — Old Money, Cigar Lounge, and Chateau Noir — created for people who prefer their scent to feel rich, polished, and unforgettable.

Old Money carries that clean, luxurious confidence — the kind of fragrance that feels expensive without trying too hard. Cigar Lounge adds a deeper, warmer mood with a smoky, bold character that feels perfect for evenings and special plans. Chateau Noir completes the trio with a dark, refined edge, giving the set a more intense and sophisticated finish.

Together, these three perfumes create a complete luxury wardrobe: one for sharp everyday confidence, one for after-dark charm, and one for moments where you want your presence to feel powerful.

Why You'll Love It 😍

-> Pack of 3 Premium Perfumes

-> Luxury-Inspired Fragrance Set

-> Perfect for Evenings & Events

-> Long-Lasting Scent Trail

-> Unisex Appeal

A trio made for people who don’t follow trends — they create presence.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
Product Type: Perfume Trio

Pack Includes: Old Money + Cigar Lounge + Chateau Noir

Fragrance Feel: Rich, smoky, refined, dark, and premium

Suitable For: Men & Women

Best For: Evenings, parties, dinners, date nights, festive occasions, and premium events

Wear Type: Long-lasting fragrance experience

Mood: Sophisticated, powerful, classy, and unforgettable

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text:
✨ Old Money

A rich, polished fragrance with soft floral luxury and a smooth woody finish.

Top Notes: Rose, Saffron

Middle Notes: Oud, Praline

Bottom Notes: Vanilla, Woody Notes

🥃 Cigar Lounge

A bold, smoky fragrance with warm spice, oud depth, and a premium lounge-like trail.

Top Notes: Whiskey

Middle Notes: Spicy Notes, Cinnamon, Coriander

Bottom Notes: Tobacco, Agarwood (Oud), Incense, Sandalwood, Patchouli, Benzoin, Vanilla, Cedar

🖤 Chateau Noir

A dark, refined fragrance with tobacco warmth, creamy sweetness, and deep woody richness.

Top Notes: Tobacco Leaf, Spicy Notes, Cinnamon

Middle Notes: Vanilla, Cacao, Tonka Bean, Tobacco Blossom

Bottom Notes: Dried Fruits, Woody Notes

sections.heading: Product Benefits
sections.text:
🖤 Three Luxury Moods in One Set

Old Money feels polished, Cigar Lounge adds smoky warmth, and Chateau Noir brings a dark, refined edge.

✨ Creates a Premium Presence

Each fragrance is designed to feel classy, confident, and memorable without being too loud.

🌙 Perfect for Evenings & Occasions

Ideal for dinner plans, parties, date nights, festive events, and premium gatherings.

⏳ Long-Lasting Scent Trail

Deep, rich notes help the fragrance stay noticeable for hours.

👔 Sharp & Sophisticated Feel

Adds a clean, well-dressed finishing touch to your overall personality.

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Unisex Appeal

Suitable for anyone who enjoys bold, smooth, and luxury-inspired perfumes.
